data.title: Update sprint SKILL.md — filter no-args to >=1 child + remove validation gate
data.description:
## Summary
Update sprint SKILL.md with two changes: (a) When invoked with no arguments, call sprint-list-epics.sh --all --min-children=1 to filter to epics with >=1 child. Show count of hidden 0-child epics below the list with a suggestion to run /dso:brainstorm. When no eligible epics remain, suggest /dso:brainstorm and exit. (b) Remove the entire "Run Validation Gate" section and VALIDATE_CMD from config resolution.

## TDD Exemption
Static assets only (criterion 3 — Markdown documentation, no executable conditional logic). Behavioral regression covered by skill eval suite (run-skill-evals.sh); SC7 defines post-delivery dogfooding.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] No-args path calls sprint-list-epics.sh with --min-children=1
  Verify: grep -q 'min-children=1' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] "Run Validation Gate" section removed (tombstone)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'Run Validation Gate' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] VALIDATE_CMD removed from config resolution (tombstone)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'VALIDATE_CMD' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Preplanning Gate section still present (confirms only validation gate removed)
  Verify: grep -q 'Preplanning Gate' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Count of hidden 0-child epics in no-args display
  Verify: grep -A10 'min-children=1' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -qi '0.*child\|zero.*child\|hidden.*epic'
- [ ] Brainstorm suggestion in no-eligible-epics path
  Verify: grep -q '/dso:brainstorm' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
